Bash(timeout 10 docker-compose exec -T app python3 -c "
import requests
url = ''https://www.beslist.nl/products/klussen/klussen_486172_488680/c/merk~1288321''
headers = {''User-Agent'': ''Beslist script voor SEO''}
print(''Making request...'')
response = requests.get(url, headers=headers, timeout=5)
print(f''Status: {response.status_code}'')
print(f''Title in response: {""beslist.nl"" in response.text}'')
print(f''WAF challenge: {""Human Verification"" in response.text}'')
print(f''Content length: {len(response.content)} bytes'')
")
Bash(timeout 5 docker-compose exec -T app sh -c "nslookup beslist.nl 2>&1")
